name: Blanc
description: Sells seeds, fertilizer, and planters. Gives you a Watering Can and Tomato Seeds. Teaches gardening basics.

name: Vanya
description: Offers the Fishing Beginner quest for levels 1–5. Teaches fishing basics. Loves fish and seafood.

name: Massimo
description: Sells advanced recipes and rare spices. Teaches cooking mechanics. Loves cooked dishes and rare ingredients.

name: Naniwa
description: Sells bug net upgrades and insect cages. Gives a 'Catch 5 Butterflies' starter quest.

name: Bailey J
description: Sells binoculars and bird feed. Provides starter binoculars and a camera for bird photos.

name: Bill
description: Teaches sea fishing techniques. Sells bait and rod upgrades. Loves rare fish.

name: Mrs. Joan
description: Sells pets (cats & dogs) and pet supplies. Unlocks after reaching D.G. Level 12. Sells pet food, toys, and accessories.

name: Bob
description: Sells furniture, crafting recipes, wood, and stone. Handles house expansion and blueprints.

name: Dorothee
description: Sells tops, bottoms, shoes, hats, and accessories with daily rotating stock. Gives a customization-unlock quest.

name: Ka Ching
description: Sells repair kits, fireworks, puzzles, and dye. Your go-to for miscellaneous items.

name: Patti
description: A lively young girl who loves painting. Childhood friend of the protagonist. Birthday: July 15.

name: Cassie
description: A quiet, mysterious figure often found deep in the forest. May offer unique quests.

name: Eric
description: A friendly town resident who gives Daily Delegations — complete 5 per day for gold and items.

name: Atara
description: The mayor who revitalized the town. Gives Main Story Quests and Resident Request tutorials.

name: Star Spirit
description: Provides main story guidance. Rewards D.G. Experience and unique furniture. Appears at key story moments.

name: Albert Jr.
description: The only NPC who buys items from players! Roams the town — track him on the map to sell your goods.

name: Oak-Oak
description: A mysterious walking tree entity. Gives the 'Astralis in Forest' quest. Rewards Roaming Oak Timber daily.
